about.title: CDN GROUP
about.paragraph1: The CDN Group is dedicated to innovation, technological development and operational excellence, operating in multiple areas to offer future-oriented solutions.
about.paragraph2: The CDN Group's operations are based on three fundamental pillars:
about.pillars: technology, corporate services and digital transformation.
about.paragraph3: Through multidisciplinary teams and advanced competencies, the group develops projects ranging from strategic consulting and institutional communication to technological solutions, intelligent systems and specialized services.

stats.title: Our Impact
stats.subtitle: Years of experience generating trust and value

features.title: WHY
features.subtitle: Discover what makes us different and unique in the market

tech.title: Technological Efficiency and Performance
tech.description: Our experience in protocol usage is guaranteed and based on our expertise and international documentation.

security.title: Advanced and Reliable Protection
security.description: TEK protects your infrastructure with advanced cybersecurity technologies and fully optimized network management.

coverage.title: Services Worldwide
coverage.description: Our international coverage offers support for events and photography. Simultaneous interpretation, technical support.

innovation.title: Innovative and Modern Solutions
innovation.description: We use the most modern technologies to ensure cutting-edge solutions that drive your business into the future.

company.title: ITC GROUP
company.description: By combining CDNTEK's excellence with ITC's industrial power, with over 31 years of experience and a track record of success in more than 1,500,000 projects, we ensure that our customers receive only superior quality products with international certifications (CE, RoHs, EN54, ISO, CCC) and European quality standards. This alliance allows CDNTEK to acquire the best and most competitive products to ultimately offer the best value and performance to our customers

business.question: How can CDNTEK help my business?
business.answer: CDNTEK offers complete solutions in IT infrastructure, network management, cybersecurity and state-of-the-art audiovisual equipment.

contact.question: What types of contacts can be established for TEK?
contact.answer: We offer multiple forms of contact: phone, email, web form, in person or through scheduled meetings.

support.question: Is technical support included?
support.answer: Yes, technical support is included in all our services and contacts, with 24/7 availability for emergencies.

smallBusiness.question: Is TEK suitable for small businesses?
smallBusiness.answer: Absolutely! We have scalable solutions suitable for companies of any size, from startups to large corporations.

implementation.question: What is the implementation time?
implementation.answer: The time varies according to the complexity of the project. We work to implement solutions quickly and efficiently.

hero.description: CDNTEK is the official representative of Guangdong BaoLun Electronics Co., Ltd. in the Iberian Peninsula, guaranteeing direct access to quality products and cutting-edge technology.

audiovisual.title: INSTALLATION, MANAGEMENT AND MAINTENANCE OF AUDIOVISUAL EQUIPMENT
audiovisual.description: Official coverage of institutional events and photographic sessions. Comprehensive technical support, including simultaneous interpretation, media management and sound assistance.

cybersecurity.title: CYBERSECURITY AND NETWORK MANAGEMENT
cybersecurity.description: TEK protects your infrastructure with advanced cybersecurity technologies and fully optimized network management. We monitor, prevent and respond to threats in real time, ensuring a secure, stable digital environment ready to scale with your business.

footer.description: Digital excellence in engineering through innovative platforms, robust code and comprehensive services.
